name: padosoft/askmydocs
description: AskMyDocs - Enterprise AI Knowledge Base (RAG) on Laravel.

suggest.predis/predis: ^2.0 — required when QUEUE_CONNECTION=redis (used by kb:ingest-folder and POST /api/kb/ingest)
suggest.laravel/horizon: ^5.0 — optional Redis queue dashboard for monitoring ingestion workers
suggest.laravel/mcp: ^0.7 — required when exposing the enterprise-kb MCP server (app/Mcp/Servers/KnowledgeBaseServer.php + 10 total tools under app/Mcp/Tools/: 5 retrieval + 5 canonical/promote)
suggest.dompdf/dompdf: ^3.0 — required when ADMIN_PDF_ENGINE=dompdf (Phase G4 PDF export strategy)
suggest.spatie/browsershot: ^4.0 — required when ADMIN_PDF_ENGINE=browsershot (Phase G4 PDF export strategy; also needs Node.js + Chromium on the host)
